title: Warehouse Clerk / Admin
description:
📢 招聘仓库文员 / 行政人员（大士西区）

全职

工作时间：星期一至星期五 8:30am – 5:30pm, 星期六 4 小时工作半天

💰 薪资：$1,900 – $2,400

地点：Tuas Crescent（步行即可到达地铁站，无需搭乘巴士）

公司提供往返工作的交通接送服务（限居住在西部地区的员工）

工作内容

• 协助安排送货时间表

• 输入并交付送货单给司机

• 在装货区检查产品，确保装车货物正确

• 一般数据输入及库存数量录入系统

福利待遇

• 每年加薪与表现奖金

• 职业发展机会

• 友好、合作的工作环境

职位要求

• 具备基本电脑技能，包括 Microsoft Word 和 Excel

📞 有兴趣的申请者，请发送以下资料： (1) 年龄 (2) 最近及期望薪资 (3) 可开始工作的日期

📢 Hiring warehouse clerk / admin in Tuas West Region

Full Time

Working hours: Monday to Friday 8.30am to 5.30pm, Saturday 4 hours half day work

💰 Salary: $1,900 to $2,400

Location: Tuas Crescent (walking distance from MRT, no need to take bus)

Company transport provided to and fro work if live in the west region

Job scope

• Assist with arranging delivery schedule

• Keying in and passing delivery orders to drivers

• Checking products at loading bay to ensure correct goods loaded onto trucks

• General data entry and input stock count into system

Welfare & Benefits

• Yearly increment and performance bonus

• Career progression

• Friendly and cooperative working environment

Job Requirements

• Basic computer skills including microsoft word and excel

📞 Interested candidates, please send your (1) age (2) last drawn and expected salary (3) date of availability

postedCompany.description:
SUPERPET PLASTIC PTE LTD


Superpet Plastic Pte Ltd is a leading manufacture in plastic bottles, caps and preforms which was established in the year 1986. Superpet Plastic shifted from Kim Chuan Terrace to the existing location in the year of May 1999.  This newly built factory has a built in area of 12,300 square meters. This expansion increases our production capacity and capability and enables us to further penetrate into local, as well as the foreign market. 

 

We pride ourselves on our ability to provide quality services and products to our valuable customers through ONE STOP SERVICE. 

 

To provide excellent and consistent services and products to our valued customers, we constantly

 

  • Make high investment in the sophisticated and latest available technologies;
  • Training and upgrading of the skills and knowledge of our dedicated staff;
  • Searching a world class quality system.

Superpet Plastic is one of the pioneer companies in the industry who has attained ISO 9001, an international recognized quality system.

 

At present, Superpet Plastic has set up 2 production plants in Tianjin & Zhangjiagang of China to manufacture and supply quality bottles and caps to MNCs companies such as Shell, ESSO, and some well established China companies. 

 

With our excellent customers support and dedicated staff, Superpet’s globalisation ambitions will soon be realised.
postedCompany.name: SUPERPET PLASTIC PTE LTD
